name: linkup_trend_research
description: Run Linkup research for one client's industry/topic space, scoped by their ClientBrandMemory icp/brand_pillars, to surface live sourced trend signal (industry_findings, claim_status-tagged). Companion tool to viral_pattern_research, which handles structural X-post pattern extraction separately. Fails clearly when LINKUP_API_KEY is unavailable rather than silently degrading.

client_id.description: Client this trend research is scoped to.

icp.description: Client's ICP from ClientBrandMemory, used to scope the industry search.

brand_pillars.description: Client's brand_pillars from ClientBrandMemory, used to narrow topic relevance.
